panels.label: VALVE RESPONSE
panels.desc: Piston valve responds instantly to road inputs, eliminating damping lag.

panels.label: VIBRATION LOSS
panels.desc: Polyurethane bushings absorb micro-vibrations, isolating the cabin from road roughness.

panels.label: BODY ROLL
panels.desc: Precision stabilizer geometry keeps the chassis flat during sharp maneuvers.

items.title: LONGEVITY FOCUS
